messages.author: Daboo
messages.text: Just got my first devices for Lexington, KY. Don’t see many folks in the area. I have a repeater on order and will get it installed in the next week or two for the Nicholasville Rd, Man-O-War area. Lot’s of houses/trees, so probably won’t get much range straight away. (edited)
messages.content_html: Just got my first devices for Lexington, KY. Don’t see many folks in the area. I have a repeater on order and will get it installed in the next week or two for the Nicholasville Rd, Man-O-War area. Lot’s of houses/trees, so probably won’t get much range straight away. (edited)

messages.author: Daboo
messages.text: With heltec v4, set to 22dBm and a whip antenna I’m able to get a radius of roughly 0.58 miles. If you’re in the area, hop on and say hi. Can’t wait to see how far the repeater goes.
messages.content_html: With heltec v4, set to 22dBm and a whip antenna I’m able to get a radius of roughly 0.58 miles. If you’re in the area, hop on and say hi. Can’t wait to see how far the repeater goes.

messages.author: Madman_9
messages.text: Yea seems me too! I will adjust the tower unit to the old settings

messages.text: Come join us here if you want to get setup in Lexington: https://meshcorelexington.com
